full_text:
Hua He (Yongxian) 華覈 (永先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hua He (華覈), styledYongxian (永先), was born in Wujin county, Wu commandery. Told Sun Hao not to attack but to gain the love of the people. Left court bemoaning Wu’s fate. Hua He was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Hua He lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
